Hello! Welcome to my website!!!

This website is my personal project to get me to be more productive. My goal with this site is to post at least 1 blog post every week for 1 year... thats ~52 weeks...

this website is still very very very new... expect things to change! (this is kinda my first time designing a website from scratch)

Who are you?

I am kirbon! Im 17 years old... some of my interests are....

  • Kirby
  • Minesweeper
  • Riichi Mahjong
  • Solitaire
  • Shogi
  • Linux (I love Debian)

I LOVE DEBIAN!!! ❤️❤️❤️❤️

What can you expect from this website?

Blog

Here ill talk about what im working on for that specific week.

Gallery

An image board for images I find worth putting on this website.

Social

My links

Log

Anything goes... kinda like a small blog for one liners or stuff that im not... too proud of...

Resource

Resources, links and attribution.
